memory.summary: The plan to finish the assignment analysis is interrupted by an invitation from cohort_3 for lunch, creating a conflict between academic goals and social expectations.

desires: Ensure the analysis section is submitted before 18:00 so I don't look incompetent to the professor.
Avoid explicitly declining the lunch invite from cohort_3, even though it risks my sleep debt and academic focus.

goals.description: Finalize the analysis section of the course assignment and submit it before 18:00.
goals.rationale: Academic outcomes carry the highest weight (0.5); submitting late risks appearing incompetent to prof_assignment, which threatens my reputation and future academic standing.

goals.description: Decline the lunch invite from cohort_3 by sending a polite but firm text message now.
goals.rationale: While I value the close_friend_group (closeness: 7), explicitly declining avoids interpersonal friction (avoidant conflict style) and protects my sleep debt (currently 2h) and focus capacity needed for the remaining reading task.

This task has a soft deadline (20:00) and lower immediate impact on my core achievement metrics compared to the submission at 18:00. It will be addressed after social obligations are managed or if energy permits.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizing g1 (academic submission) to avoid reputation damage with prof_assignment. I'm avoiding the lunch invite from cohort_3 now; sending a text later preserves our closeness while protecting my sleep debt and focus capacity for the hard task.
